author: PC Gamer
text:
Cairn revolutionizes bragging rights, lets you print a shirt showing your playthrough ascent from an in-game menu
You'll be the talk of the town.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Loot is too good in co-op RPG Fellowship, so its devs are trying to convince players why making it worse is better
Fellowship's limited build variety is about to change for the better.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Now that Subnautica 2 is out, the most wishlisted game on Steam is… a game that's been out for almost 2 years?
It's Schrödinger's game: it is both unreleased and yet one of the most popular games on Steam.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core launch times and release date
Management's calling in the big guns.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Hasbro cancelled a D&D game from the Jedi: Fallen Order director
Giant Skull and Stig Asmussen aren't making a Dungeons and Dragons game after all.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Arc Raiders says our bad with those gun durability nerfs, reinforces a bunch of weapons by up to 54%
And welcome the Rascal grenade launcher to the party.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Half-Life owes its existence to one of the game industry's most formative figures—no, not Gabe Newell, the other guy
Before there was Gabe, there was Ken Williams, and he played a significant role in bringing Half-Life into the world.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Struggling Witcher spinoff brings acclaimed Destiny 2 narrative veteran onboard as new lead writer
Kwan Perng was the narrative lead on The Final Shape, arguably Destiny 2's best expansion.
